title: senecio longicollaris
intro: Senecio longicollaris, also known as the Long-petaled Ragwort, is a plant species in the daisy family native to China and India. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its saponins and flavonoids content. The health benefits of Senecio longicollaris include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Senecio longicollaris can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
